similarity.label_zh: 互联网泡沫顶前 9 个月
互联网泡沫顶前 1 个月

summary.verdict_desc: 本周计数 6 红 / 7 黄 / 12 绿，红灯比例维持 24.0%、加权风险分维持 38.0%，与上周完全持平——25 个指标本期无一发生状态迁移（momentum 净变化 0）。表面平静之下，本周唯一实质边际来自信用面的量而非价：Amazon 于 7/7 完成约 $250 亿投资级债券发行（3-40 年期、AA- 评级、峰值需求约 $620 亿），为本轮 AI 基建又一笔单体 ≥$100 亿的新增债务，收进本周变化并上飞书；同时今年美国高收益市场已吸收约 $319 亿 AI 相关债券（截至 7/8，其中约 $279 亿投向数据中心），Morgan Stanley 将 2026 年 hyperscaler 发债预测上修至约 $4000 亿（2025 为 $1650 亿）。但值得注意的是 Amazon 这笔债的需求较前几笔已现'轻微疲劳'、投资者更挑剔要求更高收益——债务扩张仍在加速，边际吸纳力首现松动，值得跟踪。两轴判读：泡沫成熟度 stage 维持 60（亢奋段——估值、VC 集中度、vendor financing 依旧泡沫化），破裂临近度 trigger 维持 23.3（引线仍未燃）。一句话：'泡沫仍大、引线仍未燃，本周靠债务继续填燃料'。估值端极端未改但内部分化：CAPE 约 41.5（multpl 42.18、GuruFocus 41.76、YCharts 41.37）本周小幅走高、逼近 2000 年峰值 44.2；S&P 前 5 大权重回落至约 25.8%（7/2 读数，NVDA ~7.0 / AAPL ~6.3 / MSFT ~4.6 + GOOGL/AMZN），虽较上周 28% 收敛，但仍压在 25% 红线上方、前 10 大占约 36.4%；唯 NVDA 远期 PE 约 23x（GuruFocus 23.6、StockAnalysis 20.4）维持绿灯——EPS 持续上修使龙头倍数反而随股价走低。资金面仍是最大压力源（类别分 87.5、3 红）：Mag4 自由现金流深度转负（Amazon 2026 FCF 预计 -$17B~-$28B、Alphabet 骤降约 90% 至 $8.2B，行业 capex 已约等于经营现金流全部）、AI 占全球 VC 约 70%（美国 H1 达 86%、OpenAI+Anthropic 两家占 H1 的 43% 计 $217B）、NVDA 客户投资/收入约 43%（$40B+ 股权承诺 / $300B LTM），循环融资质疑升温。信用面继续最强支撑（类别分 12.5）：HY 利差约 268bps（Convex 7/7 267、FRED 7/8 270，较上周 275 略收窄，远低于 350 阈值与 3.94% 长期均值），数据中心 ABS 顶级券近两周再收窄约 60bps、发行创纪录，Neocloud 90 日内零信用事件（7/1 Meta 自建云令 CoreWeave/Nebius 股价约 -14%~-17%，暴露 Meta 对 CoreWeave $21B、对 Nebius $27B 的客户集中，但属股权层面非信用事件）。基本面持续兑现（类别分 0）：OpenRouter 年化 token 跑至约 1.5 千万亿枚（月约 100T、周约 25T，8M 开发者）、Anthropic ARR 由 5 月约 $47B 跃至约 $69B（日均增量由约 $4 亿升至约 $5.5 亿、二阶导仍正）、Oracle RPO 约 $638B（+363%）、H100 现货中位约 $2.99/hr 且半数供应商售罄无过剩、前沿进展仍在轨（METR 时程约每 4.3 个月翻倍、Opus 4.6 50% 时程 14.5 小时）。宏观情绪：Fed 维持红灯且压力上升——CME 显示 7/29 约 70% 维持，但期货隐含 12 月前加息概率已升至约 77%（一个月前仅约 24%），路径指向年内约 4%、PCE 料收于 3.6%；capex 市场反应维持黄灯（选择性：Meta 因无云业务变现、capex 指引连三季超预期而年内跌约 12.6% 并于 7/9 再挫，Alphabet/Amazon 因云增长受奖励，Google Cloud +63%）；CEO 对冲维持黄灯（Altman 称小盘 AI 估值'非理性、insane'、Dimon'焦虑很高'，但均坚持长期兑现、未集体收手）。基础判读按 red_pct 24.0%（<25%）本应为'观察期'，但分类强制升级再次生效：估值 2 红（CAPE、Top-5）叠加资金面 3 红（FCF、VC AI 占比、NVDA 客户投资），估值 + 资金面双类共振触发分类强制升级，最终维持'高风险预警'。历史相似度格局与上周完全一致（本期颜色向量未变）：最像 1999-06（顶前 9 个月，82%），其次 2021-11（78%）、2000-02（76%）、2007-10（41%）。与 2000-02（顶前 1 个月）向量的主要差异仍集中在五个信号：信用利差未走阔（268bps vs 走阔）、市场广度未崩（约 54% vs 崩溃）、内部人减持未达极端（约 8x vs 23x，且本期仍拿不到 12 家聚合美元卖买比、已连续 3 期沿用约 8x 标记疑似静态待人工核查）、IPO 未成洪流（Anthropic 瞄准 10 月、OpenAI/Databricks 倾向 2027）、NVDA 远期 PE 仍便宜（23x vs 泡沫化）——它们仍是从'1999 年中'走向'2000 年初'的确认清单。分母效应提醒：N=25 下同样 6 个红灯对应 24.0%，跨期趋势比较以方向为主。（边际净变化 net 0，未触发任何动量提示阈值。）
summary.verdict_desc_en: This week prints 6 red / 7 yellow / 12 green, with the red share holding at 24.0% and the weighted risk score steady at 38.0% — dead flat on the week, with not a single one of the 25 indicators changing status (net momentum 0). Beneath the calm, the only real marginal move came from credit quantity rather than price: Amazon completed a ~$25 billion investment-grade bond sale on July 7 (3-to-40-year maturities, AA- rated, ~$62 billion peak demand), another single ≥$10 billion tranche of new AI-buildout debt — logged in this week's changes and pushed to Feishu. Year to date the US high-yield market has absorbed ~$31.9 billion of AI-related bonds (through July 8, ~$27.9 billion of it backing data centers), and Morgan Stanley has lifted its 2026 hyperscaler bond forecast to ~$400 billion (from $165 billion in 2025). Notably, demand for the Amazon deal showed 'slight fatigue' versus earlier prints, with investors turning more selective and demanding higher yields — debt expansion is still accelerating, but the marginal capacity to absorb it wobbled for the first time and warrants tracking. Two-axis read: bubble maturity 'stage' holds at 60 (Euphoria — valuations, VC concentration and vendor financing remain bubble-grade), while rupture proximity 'trigger' holds at 23.3 (fuse still unlit). In one line: the bubble is still large, the fuse still unlit, and this week debt kept the fuel flowing. Valuations stay extreme but internally split: CAPE is ~41.5 (multpl 42.18, GuruFocus 41.76, YCharts 41.37), edging up toward the 2000 peak of 44.2; the S&P Top-5 weight eased to ~25.8% (July 2 read — NVDA ~7.0 / AAPL ~6.3 / MSFT ~4.6 plus GOOGL/AMZN), off last week's 28% but still above the 25% red line with the Top-10 at ~36.4%; only NVDA's ~23x forward PE (GuruFocus 23.6, StockAnalysis 20.4) stays green, as relentless EPS upgrades pull the leader's multiple lower even as the stock holds up. Capital remains the biggest pressure point (category score 87.5, three reds): Mag4 free cash flow is deeply negative (Amazon 2026 FCF seen at -$17B to -$28B, Alphabet's plunging ~90% to $8.2B, sector capex now roughly equal to all operating cash flow), AI is ~70% of global VC (86% of US H1, with OpenAI and Anthropic alone 43% of the half at $217B), and NVDA customer-financing runs ~43% of revenue ($40B+ of equity commitments against ~$300B LTM) as circular-financing scrutiny builds. Credit remains the strongest support (category score 12.5): HY OAS ~268bps (Convex 267 on July 7, FRED 270 on July 8, a touch tighter than last week's 275 and far below the 350 threshold and 3.94% long-run average), top-rated data-center ABS tightened another ~60bps over the past two weeks amid record issuance, and neocloud credit logged zero events in 90 days (a July 1 Meta-Compute report knocked CoreWeave/Nebius equity ~14-17%, exposing customer concentration — Meta is a $21B commitment at CoreWeave and up to $27B at Nebius — but that is an equity move, not a credit event). Fundamentals keep delivering (category score 0): OpenRouter is at a ~1.5 quadrillion-token annual run-rate (~100T/month, ~25T/week, 8M developers), Anthropic's ARR jumped from ~$47B in May to ~$69B with the daily increment rising from ~$400M to ~$550M (2nd derivative still positive), Oracle RPO is ~$638B (+363%), H100 spot medians ~$2.99/hr with half of providers sold out and no glut, and frontier progress stays on-trend (METR time horizons doubling ~every 4.3 months, Opus 4.6 at a 14.5-hour 50% horizon). Macro/sentiment: the Fed stays red with rising pressure — CME shows ~70% hold on July 29, but futures now imply a ~77% chance of a hike by December (up from ~24% a month ago), a path toward ~4% by year-end and PCE seen ending at 3.6%; the capex market reaction holds yellow (selective — Meta, lacking a cloud to monetize capex and after three straight quarters of guidance surprises, is down ~12.6% this year and fell again on July 9, while Alphabet/Amazon are rewarded for cloud growth, Google Cloud +63%); CEO hedging holds yellow (Altman calls small-cap AI valuations 'irrational, insane', Dimon says his 'anxiety is high', yet both insist AI pays off long term and CEOs have not collectively pulled back). The base framework reads Observation on red_pct of 24.0% (<25%), but the category override fires again: valuation 2 red (CAPE, Top-5) plus capital 3 red (FCF, VC AI share, NVDA customer-financing). Valuation + capital dual-category resonance triggers the forced upgrade, holding the verdict at High Risk Alert. The historical-similarity picture is identical to last week (the color vector did not change): today most resembles June 1999 (nine months before the dot-com top, 82%), then November 2021 (78%), February 2000 (76%) and October 2007 (41%). The gap versus the February 2000 (one month before the top) vector still centers on five signals: credit spreads have not widened (268bps vs widening), breadth has not broken (~54% vs collapse), insider selling is not extreme (~8x vs 23x — and the 12-name aggregate dollar sell/buy ratio was again unobtainable this period, so ~8x has now been carried for three straight weeks and is flagged suspect-static for manual review), the IPO pipeline is not a flood (Anthropic targets October, OpenAI/Databricks lean 2027), and NVDA's forward PE is still cheap (23x vs bubble-grade) — together the checklist for confirming a move from 'mid-1999' to 'early-2000'. Denominator reminder: with N=25 the same six reds map to 24.0%, so cross-period trend comparison should lean on direction. (Net momentum 0, below every momentum-alert threshold.)

wow_changes.note: Amazon 于 7/7 完成约 $250 亿投资级债券发行（3-40 年期、AA- 评级、峰值需求约 $620 亿），为本轮 AI 基建又一笔单体 ≥$100 亿的新增债务；今年美国高收益市场已吸收约 $319 亿 AI 相关债券（截至 7/8），Morgan Stanley 上修 2026 hyperscaler 发债预测至约 $4000 亿
wow_changes.note_en: Amazon completed a ~$25B investment-grade bond sale on July 7 (3-40yr maturities, AA-, ~$62B peak demand) — another single ≥$10B tranche of AI-buildout debt; the US high-yield market has now absorbed ~$31.9B of AI-related bonds YTD (through July 8), and Morgan Stanley lifted its 2026 hyperscaler bond forecast to ~$400B

indicators.threshold_text_en: >35 red / 25-35 yellow / <25 green
indicators.note: CAPE 约 41.5（multpl 42.18、GuruFocus 41.76、YCharts 41.37），较上周约 40.5 小幅走高，逼近 2000 年峰值 44.2（仅差约 6%），远高于长期均值约 32、中位数约 16，估值处极度拉伸区，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: CAPE sits near 41.5 (multpl 42.18, GuruFocus 41.76, YCharts 41.37), a touch higher than last week's ~40.5 and only ~6% below the 2000 peak of 44.2 — far above its ~32 long-run average and ~16 median; valuations remain extremely stretched, stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >25% red / 18-25% yellow / <25% green
indicators.note: S&P 500 前 5 大合计约 25.8%（7/2 读数，NVDA ~7.0% / AAPL ~6.3% / MSFT ~4.6% + GOOGL/AMZN），较上周约 28% 收敛但仍压在 25% 红线上方；前 10 大占约 36.4%，集中度仍处历史高位，市值高度押注少数 AI 龙头，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: The S&P 500's Top-5 total ~25.8% (July 2 read — NVDA ~7.0% / AAPL ~6.3% / MSFT ~4.6% plus GOOGL/AMZN), off last week's ~28% but still above the 25% red line; the Top-10 is ~36.4% and concentration stays historically elevated, with the index heavily bet on a handful of AI leaders — stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >40 red / 30-40 yellow / <30 green
indicators.note: NVDA 远期 PE 约 23x（GuruFocus 23.6、StockAnalysis 20.4，区间约 20-24x），较半导体行业中位数约 35 折价约 33%；EPS 持续上修使倍数随股价走低、反而回到 2019 年 AI 叙事之前水平，NVDA 估值并非泡沫源头，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA's forward PE is ~23x (GuruFocus 23.6, StockAnalysis 20.4; ~20-24x range), ~33% below the ~35 semiconductor-industry median; ongoing EPS upgrades pull the multiple down even as the stock holds — back to pre-AI-narrative 2019 levels; NVDA's valuation is not the bubble's source, stays green

indicators.name_zh: AI 私募二级市场标价
indicators.threshold_text: 折价/下跌=红 / 溢价收窄+卖压=黄 / 溢价稳定或扩大=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Discount/falling = red / Narrowing premium + sell pressure = yellow / Stable-to-wider premium = green
indicators.note: 二级标价本周走强：Anthropic 隐含估值升至约 $1.2T（Caplight，较上周约 $1T 上行、YoY 约 550%），买盘远多于卖盘、'几乎无人卖'；OpenAI 约 $908B（Caplight）/ $880B（Forge，较 $852B primary 溢价约 3%），GPT-5.6 发布重新点燃买方兴趣。旗舰标的均无折价、溢价扩大，一级市场无退潮信号，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Secondary marks firmed this week: Anthropic's implied valuation rose to ~$1.2T (Caplight, up from ~$1T and +550% YoY) with buyers far outnumbering sellers and 'almost no one selling'; OpenAI is ~$908B (Caplight) / $880B (Forge, ~3% above its $852B primary), with the GPT-5.6 release rekindling buyer interest. No flagship trades at a discount and premiums are widening — no retreat signal, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / Accelerating = yellow / Steady = green
indicators.note: 四大 hyperscaler 2026 capex 合计约 $660-725B（AMZN $200B、MSFT $190B、GOOGL $175-185B、META $125-145B），YoY 约 +77%，无一下调指引；AI capex 约以 70%/年扩张对 23% 现金流增速，行业整体 FCF 料于 Q3 转负。绝对增速仍在加速、不可持续特征明显，维持黄灯（无新季报，沿用最新指引）
indicators.note_en: The four hyperscalers guide ~$660-725B of 2026 capex (AMZN $200B, MSFT $190B, GOOGL $175-185B, META $125-145B), ~+77% YoY, with none cutting guidance; AI capex is compounding ~70%/yr against 23% cash-flow growth, pushing aggregate FCF negative by Q3. The pace is still accelerating with clear unsustainability hallmarks — stays yellow (no new quarterly print, latest guidance carried)

indicators.threshold_text_en: <-20% red / -20%~0 yellow / >0 green
indicators.note: 自由现金流被 capex 深度吞噬：Amazon 2026 全年 FCF 料转负（Morgan Stanley -$17B、BofA -$28B），Alphabet FCF 骤降约 90% 至 $8.2B，行业 capex 已约等于经营现金流全部（10 年均值仅约 40%）、料 Q3 整体转负；Mag7 由'造现金'转向'吞现金'、需外部融资（本周 Amazon $25B 发债即为例证），维持红灯（无新季报，沿用最新估算）
indicators.note_en: Free cash flow is being deeply consumed by capex: Amazon's 2026 FCF is set to turn negative (Morgan Stanley -$17B, BofA -$28B), Alphabet's FCF is plunging ~90% to $8.2B, and sector capex now roughly equals all operating cash flow (vs a 10-year average of ~40%), with aggregate FCF seen going negative by Q3; the Mag7 story has shifted from cash generation to cash consumption, leaning on external financing (this week's $25B Amazon bond is Exhibit A) — stays red (no new quarterly print, latest estimates carried)

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.threshold_text_en: >50% red / 30-50% yellow / <30% green
indicators.note: PitchBook/Crunchbase H1 2026：AI 占全球创投超 70%（一年前不足 50%）、占美国创投达 86%（$355.9B）；H1 全球创投创纪录 $510B，OpenAI 与 Anthropic 两家占 H1 的 43%（$217B）；美元高度集中于少数巨额轮次，远超 50% 红线，维持红灯（无新季度数据，沿用 H1）
indicators.note_en: PitchBook/Crunchbase H1 2026: AI took >70% of global VC (up from under 50% a year ago) and 86% of US VC ($355.9B); record H1 global VC of $510B, with OpenAI and Anthropic alone at 43% of the half ($217B); dollars concentrate in a few mega-rounds far above the 50% red line — stays red (no new quarterly data, H1 carried)

indicators.threshold_text_en: >30% red / 15-30% yellow / <15% green (Lucent '99 peak: 24%)
indicators.note: NVDA 2026 年 AI 股权承诺逾 $40B（OpenAI $30B 直投 + CoreWeave $2B/IREN $2.1B/Corning $3.2B/Marvell/Lumentum/Coherent 各 $2B），占约 $300B LTM 收入约 43%，远超 Lucent 1999 峰值 24%；连续红灯，每笔投资多绑采购协议、'为自身供应链融资+锁客'的循环特征愈发受质疑（$30B 集中于 OpenAI 单一标的），承诺额环比未见收敛，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA committed $40B+ of AI equity in 2026 ($30B direct into OpenAI plus CoreWeave $2B / IREN $2.1B / Corning $3.2B / Marvell, Lumentum, Coherent $2B each), ~43% of ~$300B LTM revenue — far above Lucent's 1999 peak of 24%; a persistent red, with most deals tied to purchase agreements and its 'financing its own supply chain while locking in customers' loop drawing growing scrutiny ($30B concentrated in a single name, OpenAI) and no sequential narrowing — stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: <40% red / 40-60% yellow / >60% green
indicators.note: S5FI 最新读数约 54.1%（本周 54.07-54.27），仍落在 40-60% 黄区、较上周约 55.3% 微降；尽管头部 AI/芯片股回调，广度未同步走弱、参与度维持中性，未见头部独涨的顶部信号，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: S5FI's latest read is ~54.1% (54.07-54.27 this week), still inside the 40-60% yellow band and slightly below last week's ~55.3%; even as mega-cap AI/chip names pulled back, breadth did not weaken with them and participation stays neutral — no narrow-leadership top signal yet, stays yellow

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.threshold_text_en: >20x = red / 5-20x = yellow / <5x = green (2000 peak: 23x)
indicators.note: 内部人以卖为主、买入近乎消失：Palantir CEO Karp 近 6 月分 15 笔售约 89.1 万股、COO Sankar 约 33.4 万股，NVDA/PLTR/META 三家 3 年累计净卖约 $15.6B（截至 7/3），NVDA 过去一年零内部人买入；聚合卖买比偏高但仍未及 2000 年 23x 极值，维持黄灯。⚠ 本期仍未获 12 家 30 日聚合卖/买美元总额，约 8x 已连续 3 期沿用，标记疑似静态、待人工核查
indicators.note_en: Insider flows stay sell-heavy with buying all but gone: Palantir's CEO Karp sold ~891k shares across 15 tranches over ~6 months and COO Sankar ~334k, NVDA/PLTR/META insiders have dumped a net ~$15.6B over three years (through July 3), and NVDA has logged zero insider purchases in a year; the aggregate ratio is elevated but below the 2000 extreme of 23x — stays yellow. Note: the 12-name 30-day aggregate sell/buy dollar figure was again unobtainable, so ~8x has now been carried three weeks running and is flagged suspect-static for manual review

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: 管道继续升温但未成洪流：Anthropic 已递交 S-1（$965B post 估值、约 $69B ARR），瞄准 10 月上市、拟募超 $60B；但 OpenAI（约 $33B ARR）倾向 2027（预测市场给'2026 年内不 IPO'约 79.5%）、Databricks（$5.4B ARR、唯一盈利）料 H2 递表但更可能 2027。临近发行的具体公司数仍 <10，窗口谨慎，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The pipeline keeps warming but is short of a flood: Anthropic has filed its S-1 ($965B post-money, ~$69B ARR), targets an October listing and aims to raise $60B+; but OpenAI (~$33B ARR) leans to 2027 (betting markets put 'no IPO in 2026' at ~79.5%) and Databricks ($5.4B ARR, the only profitable name) is expected to file in H2 yet is more likely a 2027 story. The count of imminent names is still under 10 and the window stays cautious — stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text_en: >500 red / 350-500 yellow / <350 green
indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 约 268bps（Convex 7/7 报 267、FRED 7/8 报 270），较上周约 275 略收窄，仍远低于长期均值 3.94%、中位数 4.52%；尽管 AI capex 持续烧钱、Amazon 本周再发 $25B 债，信用市场对 AI 风险仍无压力，是当前最支撑多头的指标，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS is ~268bps (Convex 267 on July 7, FRED 270 on July 8), marginally tighter than last week's ~275 and far below the 3.94% long-run average and 4.52% median; despite ongoing AI capex burn and Amazon's fresh $25B bond this week, credit markets show no stress on AI risk — the most bull-supportive indicator right now, stays green

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: 数据中心 ABS 条件持续宽松：顶级券利差近两周再收窄约 60bps（回撤幅度超多数其他资产类别，同期次级车贷仅收窄约 40bps），2026 有望创发行纪录（年初已约 $1.45B，KBRA 对 DataBank 2026-1 等给出预评级）；发行火热且被充分吸纳，信用市场对 AI 基建仍无压力，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Data-center ABS conditions stay accommodative: top-rated spreads tightened another ~60bps over the past two weeks (outpacing most other asset classes, versus ~40bps for subprime auto), and 2026 is on track for record issuance (~$1.45B launched to start the year, with KBRA assigning preliminary ratings to deals like DataBank 2026-1); heavy issuance is well absorbed and there is no credit stress on AI infrastructure — stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 任何违约/降级=红
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any default/downgrade = red
indicators.note: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda / Applied Digital 90 日内无评级下调或违约；7/1 Meta 自建云（Meta Compute）消息令 CoreWeave 约 -14%、Nebius 约 -17%，暴露客户集中（Meta 对 CoreWeave 承诺约 $21B、对 Nebius 至多 $27B），但属股权层面而非信用事件。GPU 抵押债与再融资墙集中 2026-27 仍是潜在隐患——短期零信用事件，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda / Applied Digital — no downgrades or defaults in 90 days; a July 1 Meta-Compute report knocked CoreWeave ~14% and Nebius ~17%, exposing customer concentration (Meta is a ~$21B commitment at CoreWeave and up to $27B at Nebius), but that is an equity move, not a credit event. GPU-collateralized debt and a 2026-27 refinancing wall remain latent risks — yet with zero near-term credit events it stays green

indicators.name_zh: 全口径债务/Capex 流量比
indicators.threshold_text_en: ≥70% red / 50-70% yellow / <50% green (dot-com peak: 80-100%)
indicators.note: 周度台账：本周新增 Amazon $25B 投资级债券（7/7，AA-、3-40 年、峰值需求约 $62B）单笔 ≥$10B，已计入 wow_changes 与飞书；另 QTS 约 $2B 债+贷本月中定价。YTD 美国高收益 AI 债券约 $31.9B（截至 7/8，$27.9B 投数据中心），Morgan Stanley 将 2026 hyperscaler 发债预测上修至约 $400B。台账仍沿 MS 锚定 2026E 全口径新增债务约 $570B，分母 = 2026E 全口径 compute capex 约 $1.04T，$570B ÷ $1.04T ≈ 55%（区间 50-60%），低于互联网/电信基建顶 80-100%，维持黄灯。距上次完整对账（7/6）6 天，下次约 8/3。
indicators.note_en: Weekly ledger: a new Amazon $25B investment-grade bond this week ($10B+ single deal — July 7, AA-, 3-40yr, ~$62B peak demand) is logged in wow_changes and Feishu; QTS is also marketing ~$2B of bonds and loans for mid-month. YTD US high-yield AI bonds are ~$31.9B (through July 8, $27.9B into data centers), and Morgan Stanley lifted its 2026 hyperscaler bond forecast to ~$400B. The ledger holds MS's anchor of ~$570B of 2026E all-in new AI debt; denominator = 2026E all-in compute capex ~$1.04T. $570B / $1.04T ≈ 55% (50-60% range), below the 80-100% dot-com/telecom peak — stays yellow. Six days since the last full reconciliation (July 6); next recon ~Aug 3.
indicators.source_name: Morgan Stanley + 自下而上台账

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: OpenRouter 年化跑至约 1.5 千万亿 token/年（月约 100T、周约 25T、5 倍于半年前），平台 8M 开发者、Deloitte 称 67% 企业月耗 >10 亿 token；agentic 推理（单请求由数千 token 升至 10 万-100 万 token）为最快增长源，全产业用量继续加速，维持绿灯（无独立新月度披露，沿用最新 OpenRouter 跑量口径）
indicators.note_en: OpenRouter is at a ~1.5 quadrillion tokens/year run-rate (~100T/month, ~25T/week, 5x in six months), with 8M developers and Deloitte noting 67% of enterprises consume 1B+ tokens/month; agentic inference (single requests rising from thousands to 100K-1M tokens) is the fastest-growing driver and industry-wide usage keeps accelerating — stays green (no independent new monthly print, latest OpenRouter run-rate carried)

indicators.threshold_text: 环比跌>15%/供过于求=红 / 阴跌=黄 / 稳定或上涨=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: -15%+ MoM / glut = red / Drifting lower = yellow / Stable-to-rising = green
indicators.note: H100 按需约 $2.01/hr 起、群组中位约 $2.99/hr（较 2024 初 >$7 已大幅回落但近月企稳），H200 中位约 $4.0/hr；近期需求走高令可得性下降——问询 8 节点（64 卡）H100/H200 约半数供应商完全售罄、多数无 Hopper 现货，无供给过剩迹象。Blackwell 放量后关注是否转阴跌，本指标是算力供需最直接温度计，维持绿灯（价格企稳偏紧）
indicators.note_en: H100 on-demand starts ~$2.01/hr with a cohort median ~$2.99/hr (down sharply from >$7 in early 2024 but steady in recent months); H200 median ~$4.0/hr. Recent demand has cut availability — hunting even 8 nodes (64 GPUs) of H100/H200 finds ~half of providers completely sold out and most with no Hopper spot, with no sign of glut. Watch for a sustained drift lower once Blackwell ramps; as the most direct thermometer of compute supply-demand this stays green (prices firm and tight)

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR 由 5 月约 $47B 跃至约 $69B，日均增量由约 $4 亿升至约 $5.5 亿（4 月 $30B→8 周内翻倍，Claude Code 由 2025/9 的 $500M 增至 5 月 $8B），领先 OpenAI 约 $33B；月增量持续放大、二阶导维持正向，唯 Anthropic 含云分销毛收入口径仍存争议，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Anthropic's ARR jumped from ~$47B in May to ~$69B, with the daily increment rising from ~$400M to ~$550M ($30B in April, doubling within eight weeks; Claude Code went from $500M in Sept 2025 to $8B in May), leading OpenAI's ~$33B; the monthly increment keeps expanding and the 2nd derivative stays positive, though Anthropic's gross cloud-reseller revenue basis remains contested — stays green

indicators.threshold_text_en: <50% red / 50-65% yellow / >65% green
indicators.note: McKinsey Q1 2026：72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 生产化（2024 为 55%、2020 为 20%），5000+ 人企业达 83%；但近 2/3 尚未跨企业规模化、仅约 23% 在规模化 agentic 系统。头部部署率高位、深度集成仍在爬坡，维持绿灯（季度调查，无新数据沿用 Q1）
indicators.note_en: McKinsey Q1 2026: 72% of enterprises run at least one AI workload in production (vs 55% in 2024, 20% in 2020), rising to 83% at firms with 5,000+ employees; but nearly two-thirds have not scaled enterprise-wide and only ~23% are scaling an agentic system. The headline rate is high while deep integration keeps climbing — stays green (quarterly survey, Q1 carried)

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Oracle FY26 RPO 逐季抬升至约 $638B（+363% YoY，Q4 环比 +$85B），与 OpenAI/xAI/Meta/Nvidia/AMD 多笔数十亿级合约绑定；MSFT 商业 RPO 与 Google Cloud 积压（超 $460B）合计推动全行业递延需求逾 $1.4T，订单积压强劲；唯 Oracle 逾 50% RPO 来自 OpenAI，强需求与客户集中并存，维持绿灯（无新季报沿用）
indicators.note_en: Oracle's FY26 RPO rose each quarter to ~$638B (+363% YoY, +$85B sequentially in Q4), tied to multi-billion-dollar contracts with OpenAI/xAI/Meta/Nvidia/AMD; combined with Microsoft's commercial RPO and Google Cloud's $460B+ backlog, industry deferred demand tops $1.4T and the order book is robust; but over 50% of Oracle's RPO is from OpenAI — strong demand alongside concentration. Stays green (no new quarterly print, carried)

indicators.threshold_text: 停滞=红 / 放缓=黄 / 正常或加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Stalled = red / Decelerating = yellow / On-trend or accelerating = green
indicators.note: 前沿进展仍在轨且偏加速：METR 时程倍增时间自 2023 后压缩至约 4.3 个月（130.8 天，2019-2023 约 7 个月），最强模型 Claude Opus 4.6 的 50% 成功率时程达约 14.5 小时（2 月）；困难基准 90 天内密集刷新（HLE 约 53%、FrontierMath 破 52%、ARC-AGI-2 上 70%、SWE-bench Verified 约 91%）。capex 第一性支撑（模型持续变好解锁场景）完好，维持绿灯（对比台账上期无实质放缓迹象）
indicators.note_en: Frontier progress stays on-trend and if anything accelerating: METR's time-horizon doubling time compressed to ~4.3 months post-2023 (130.8 days, vs ~7 months in 2019-2023), with the strongest model, Claude Opus 4.6, at a ~14.5-hour 50% horizon (February); hard benchmarks keep resetting within 90 days (HLE ~53%, FrontierMath past 52%, ARC-AGI-2 above 70%, SWE-bench Verified ~91%). The first-principles support for capex (models keep improving, unlocking use cases) is intact — stays green (no material slowdown versus the prior ledger reading)

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 本周无核心 AI 龙头新增正式执法：Builder.ai（$180M round-tripping，SEC 在查）、iLearningEngines（4/17 起诉）、Super Micro（E&Y 辞任、旧 SEC 案）均非核心 AI 领导者。Burry 持续指控 Mag7 借延长 GPU 折旧（5-6 年 vs 实际 2-3 年）2026-28 虚增利润约 $176B，属观点而非执法；SEC 对 AI-washing 关注上升但未触及核心龙头，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: No new formal enforcement against a core AI bellwether this week: Builder.ai ($180M round-tripping, SEC probing), iLearningEngines (indicted April 17) and Super Micro (E&Y resigned; older SEC matter) are not core AI leaders. Michael Burry keeps alleging the Mag7 inflate 2026-28 profits by ~$176B via extended GPU depreciation (5-6 years vs a real 2-3) — a view, not an enforcement action; the SEC's AI-washing focus is rising but has not reached core leaders — stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: Fed 政策向量指向加息且本周压力上升：CME 显示 7/29 FOMC 约 70% 维持（6 月 12-0 维持 3.50-3.75%），但期货隐含 12 月前加息概率已升至约 77%（一个月前仅约 24%），路径指向年内约 4%、并在 2027 中前维持近 4%；官方预计 PCE 年末收于 3.6%（前值 2.7%），9 位官员见年内≥1 次加息。方向明确向上，对极度拉伸估值构成实质压制，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: The Fed's policy vector points to hikes, and pressure rose this week: CME shows ~70% hold at the July 29 FOMC (June was a 12-0 hold at 3.50-3.75%), but futures now imply a ~77% chance of a hike by December (up from ~24% a month ago), a path toward ~4% by year-end holding near 4% into mid-2027; officials see PCE ending the year at 3.6% (from 2.7%), with 9 projecting at least one hike this year. The direction is clearly up — a real headwind for extremely stretched valuations, stays red

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: 市场反应维持'混合/选择性惩罚'：有云变现能力的被奖励——Alphabet/Amazon 财报后走高、Google Cloud +63%、MSFT $190B capex 获认可；无云变现的被罚——Meta 因广告单一收入、capex 指引连三季超预期，年内跌约 12.6%、7/9 再挫、跌破 $600。市场对 AI capex 由一致奖励转为'拿出回报证据'的选择性审视，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The market reaction holds 'mixed/selective punishment': names that can monetize capex via cloud are rewarded — Alphabet/Amazon rose post-earnings, Google Cloud +63%, and Microsoft's $190B capex was accepted; those that cannot are punished — Meta, reliant on ad revenue and after three straight quarters of guidance surprises, is down ~12.6% this year, fell again on July 9 and slipped below $600. The market has shifted from uniformly rewarding AI capex to a selective 'show me the returns' scrutiny — stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 对冲表态持续但未成一致：Altman 直言小盘 AI 估值'非理性、insane'、'三人一个想法'即获十亿估值'必有人巨亏'；Dimon 称对市场'焦虑很高'、'far more worried than others'、'不少钱很可能会亏'；但两人仍坚持 AI 长期'会兑现'（Dimon 类比汽车/电视）、CEO 未集体收手，未达全体承认过热，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: Hedging persists but is not universal: Altman calls small-cap AI valuations 'irrational, insane' and warns that 'three people and an idea' funded at billion-dollar marks means 'someone will get burned'; Dimon says his 'anxiety is high', that he is 'far more worried than others' and 'a lot of the money will probably be lost'; yet both insist AI 'pays off' long term (Dimon likening it to cars and TVs) and CEOs have not collectively pulled back — short of a universal 'overheated' consensus, stays yellow
